subjects.description: An oncoming vehicle in the opposite lane, identifiable mainly by its intensely bright high-beam headlights piercing through the darkness; the body of the car is obscured behind the glare, only faint hints of a dark sedan silhouette visible around the light source
subjects.appearance_details: Two blinding white-blue headlight pools mirrored and multiplied by snow, with lens-flare star artifacts, halation, and bloom; faint amber side marker glow through the flurries
subjects.relationship: The source of glare impairing the ego vehicle's visibility; travels directly opposite the ego on the shared snow-packed street
subjects.location: center to slightly left of frame, approaching from background to midground
subjects.relative_size: Small within frame growing to Medium within frame as it nears
subjects.orientation: Front-facing toward the camera, headlights aimed directly at the ego viewpoint
subjects.action: Approaching on the opposite lane with high beams on, then passing by
subjects.state_changes: Grows brighter and larger as it nears the plowed rise, doubling off the snow, peaks in glare at closest approach, then sweeps past to the left and recedes, glare clearing

subjects.description: The ego vehicle itself, represented only by its interior dashboard edge and the forward illumination of its own headlights spilling onto the road ahead
subjects.appearance_details: Faint dashboard reflection along the bottom edge of the frame, twin cones of headlight light spreading over the asphalt and lane markings
subjects.relationship: The point-of-view vehicle through which the entire scene is observed
subjects.location: implied at camera position, dashboard at bottom foreground
subjects.orientation: Facing forward down the road in the driving direction
subjects.action: Driving the snow-packed street, lifting over a plowed rise, then continuing while slowing and resuming speed
subjects.state_changes: Decelerates significantly during peak glare, then accelerates back to nominal cruising speed

background_setting: A flat Scandinavian residential street on a winter night, snow falling lightly over snow-packed roadway and white-laden roofs of wooden houses. Faint warm window light and sparse street lamps glow through the flurries; plowed snowbanks line both sides and the lane markings are buried under packed snow. The street runs level then lifts over a low plowed rise ahead, a crest that briefly hides then reveals the oncoming lane. Beyond the lamps the snowy neighborhood fades into soft dark.

lighting.conditions: Snowy winter night with sparse street lamps and warm window light; snow-packed roadway
lighting.direction: Ego headlights front-lit onto snow; intense oncoming high-beam glare ahead and slightly left, blazing off the snow
lighting.shadows: Soft bluish shadows on snow from lamps, flattened by falling flakes
lighting.illumination_effect: Headlights glare brilliantly off snow-packed road and banks; oncoming high beams produce overwhelming snow-amplified bloom, flake-scattered starburst flares, and blinding washout

aesthetics.composition: Centered snowy street with the plowed rise near mid-frame, oncoming glare blazing off snow upper-center, dashboard edge at bottom
aesthetics.color_scheme: Blue-white snow and dark timber houses with warm window amber, cut by harsh white-blue headlight glare doubled by snow
aesthetics.mood_atmosphere: Tense, hushed, disorienting, blindingly bright off snow, very cautious
aesthetics.patterns: Falling snowflakes streaking past and plowed snowbank edges

cinematography.camera_motion: Forward dashcam tracking on packed snow, faint traction wobble, subtle bob over the plowed rise, deceleration drift then re-acceleration
cinematography.framing: Wide shot of the road ahead from driver viewpoint
cinematography.focus: Snow-packed road ahead, though glare off the snow overwhelms focus at peak brightness

context: Demonstration of nighttime oncoming-headlight glare and driver visibility management on a snowy residential street

actions.description: Ego vehicle drives the snowy residential street at nominal speed, distant oncoming headlights appear faint past a plowed rise
Vehicle lifts over the plowed rise; oncoming high beams rapidly intensify, blazing off the snow with glare and lens artifacts
Ego vehicle slows significantly to manage impaired visibility as the oncoming car passes on the left
Glare clears, snowy road becomes visible again, ego vehicle resumes nominal speed

segments.description: Driving the snow-packed street at steady speed with faint oncoming light growing past a plowed rise
segments.key_changes: Distant headlights begin to appear through the flurries
segments.camera: Forward tracking with slight upward pitch on the climb

segments.description: Lifting over the plowed rise as oncoming high beams flare into severe snow-amplified glare
segments.key_changes: Rapid increase in brightness, bloom off snow and flake-scattered starburst wash across the frame
segments.camera: Subtle bob over the crest, then leveling into descent

segments.description: Ego vehicle slows for the passing car, then glare clears and nominal speed resumes
segments.key_changes: Deceleration, oncoming vehicle sweeps past left, artifacts fade, snowy road regains visibility, re-acceleration
segments.camera: Slight forward dip during braking, then smooth resumed forward tracking

temporal_caption: At 0:00 the dashcam view shows a snowy Scandinavian street at night, ego headlights blazing off packed snow and snowbanks while a faint glow appears past a plowed rise. By 0:01 the vehicle lifts over the rise and a pair of oncoming high beams rapidly brightens, doubled by the snow. Through 0:02-0:03 the view is overwhelmed by snow-amplified white-blue glare, flake-scattered lens flares, and blinding bloom. Around 0:03 the ego slows noticeably to cope with impaired visibility as the oncoming car sweeps past on the left. From 0:04 to 0:05 the glare clears, the snowy road reappears, and the ego accelerates back to nominal cruising speed.
audio_description: Muffled low hum of the engine and crunch of tires on snow-packed road, rising then dipping as the vehicle decelerates. Snow-hushed quiet, a soft whoosh of the oncoming vehicle passing; no music or speech.
